summary: Test strategy now protects packaged Skill routing metadata and one-AC review reply skeletons as objective assets, while docs explicitly keep generated AC quality and operation-path sufficiency in Skill dogfood and user review rather than automated natural-language tests.

sources.label: opennori-self-skill-asset-protocol-guards
sources.summary: Architecture Baseline alignment context. This is not Product AC evidence by itself.

reviewability: Open test/docs-schema.test.js and docs/testing.md, then rerun the focused docs test, lint, and typecheck.
limitations: This proves the objective Skill asset guardrails only. Real AC quality still requires Skill evals, dogfood, and user confirmation.
